quality.rationale: 基于电磁场应力能量张量推导标量不变式，需串联能流定义与场不变量，逻辑严密且具经典相对论物理背景

origin.question: Problem 4.4. Show that $\mathfrak{S}^2 - |\underline{\mathbf{S}}|^2$ is a Lorentz invariant of the electromagnetic field, where $\mathfrak{S}$ is the energy density and $\underline{\mathbf{S}}$ the Poynting flux.
origin.answer: $\mathfrak{S}^2 - |\\underline{\\mathbf{S}}|^2$ 为洛伦兹不变量，其值正比于 $(\mathbf{E}^2 - \mathbf{B}^2)^2 + 4(\mathbf{E} \cdot \mathbf{B})^2$。
origin.solution:
Solution 4.4. The expression is shown to be invariant by relating it to the invariants $\mathbf{E}^2 -\mathbf{B}^2$ and $\underline{\mathbf{E}}\cdot \underline{\mathbf{B}}$
$$
\begin{array}{l} 6 4 \pi (\mathfrak {S}^{2} - | \underline {{{\mathbf {S}}}} |^{2} ) = ( \mathbf {E}^{2} + \mathbf {B}^{2} )^{2} - 4 ( \underline {{{\mathbf {E}}}} \times \underline {{{\mathbf {B}}}} )^{2} \\\\ = \left[ \mathbf {E}^{4} + 2 \mathbf {E}^{2} \mathbf {B}^{2} + \mathbf {B}^{4} \right] - 4 \left[ \mathbf {E}^{2} \mathbf {B}^{2} - ( \underline {{{\mathbf {E}}}} \cdot \underline {{{\mathbf {B}}}} )^{2} \right] \\\\ = \mathrm {E}^{4} - 2 \mathrm {E}^{2} \mathrm {B}^{2} + \mathrm {B}^{4} + 4 ( \underline {{\mathrm {E}}} \cdot \underline {{\mathrm {B}}} )^{2} \\\\ = \left(\mathrm {E}^{2} - \mathrm {B}^{2} \right)^{2} + 4 ( \underset {\sim} {\mathrm {E}} \cdot \underset {\sim} {\mathrm {B}} )^{2} . \\\\
\end{array}
$$
